title: Agent rewrites one block by id, with idempotency, without clobbering siblings (M60 §6.3 C3)

fixture.prompt: Rewrite block b-summary on page p1 to read 'Tier 3 ships Friday.'

content.text: Ship Tier 3 by end of week.

dimensions.description: Did the agent call edit_block (vs. read_page+write_page)?
Resulting block keeps id=b-summary, and b-intro / b-actions ids are untouched?
b-intro and b-actions text is byte-identical post-edit?
If the agent retries with the same idempotencyKey, the second call is a no-op (no double revision bump)?
Tool was correctly tagged requires-approval before execution?

_runner_status: TODO — runner ships with T6. JSON shape is the contract.
